title: Living Online
author: Saaida, Mohammed
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Have you ever experienced meeting a person somewhere, where he or she kept attached to his smartphone while you were speaking to him or her? Did anyone hit you while gazing at his device? Did your friend tag you a Facebook post at 4:00 AM, or invite you to a live stream? There are a bunch of questions you may ask yourself about things you noticed. For example, why my colleague became isolated, having new weird opinions, or his behaviors are unjustified? I am sorry to tell you that these people were shifted by the Internet to live online instead of living real life.
